seoTitle: Wentworth Falls vs Wentworth Point — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Wentworth Falls and Wentworth Point. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Wentworth Falls vs Wentworth Point: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Wentworth Falls and Wentworth Point.
heading: Wentworth Falls vs Wentworth Point — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Wentworth Falls, New South Wales and Wentworth Point, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Wentworth Falls has a lower overall climate risk score (37/100) compared to Wentworth Point (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Wentworth Falls or Wentworth Point safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Wentworth Falls has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Wentworth Point scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Wentworth Falls scores 56/100 for bushfire risk. Wentworth Point scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Wentworth Falls or Wentworth Point?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Wentworth Falls has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.12% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
